releases.label: release 0.8
releases.title: Beta version
highlights: beta version! please report any bugs you find!

releases.title: Mobile Play Polish
highlights: Mobile turns now keep the timer visible beside Roll Dice, End Turn, and waiting states.
Small phone layouts have a tighter command row while keeping the resource inventory stable.
Shared controls now have clearer focus states, larger touch targets, and better accessible labels.
Game-log dice now read flatter in the feed while compact dice elsewhere keep their raised look.
